chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-763 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For non prosecution. ------ 28.08.2025 Mr. Ali Madad Habibullah Arijo, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ------ Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the respondents are ready to redress the grievance of the petitioner, therefore, he under the instructions does not press instant petition. Learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh, present in the Court in connection with some other matters, waives notice of instant petition and does not oppose the proposal advanced by the counsel for the petitioner. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
